cases.prompt: Run scenario forms.required-fields from web-ux-test/plan.yaml against staging with Playwright MCP. Auth uses a saved browser session.
cases.expected_output: Executes the selected validated scenario with Playwright MCP, captures browser evidence, writes structured findings, and summarizes results.
assertions: Takes accessibility snapshots before navigation or interaction.

cases.prompt: Explore the checkout flow from our validated web UX plan and capture console/network failures as evidence.
cases.expected_output: Runs the relevant plan scope safely with Playwright MCP and records console, network, screenshot, URL, and accessibility evidence for any findings.
assertions: Does not request or print credentials.
Stops on critical safety or auth blockers.

cases.prompt: Generate Playwright CLI regression tests for all convert_to_regression_test scenarios.
cases.expected_output: The skill should not trigger; Playwright CLI generation belongs to convert-web-ux-plan-to-playwright-tests.
assertions: Does not use this skill for CLI test generation.
